free_text: Elastic and inelastic scattering of photons by Si-28
The energy spectra of 90 degree scattered photons have
been measured in the betatron bremsstrahlung beam for
Si-28 and Cr-52 nuclei at 16 end-point energy values
from 13.1 to 31 MeV.  The spectra were used to
calculate the cross sections for photon elastic and
4.98-MeV levels for the Si-28 nucleus and 1.43-MeV
and 2.96-MeV levels for the Cr-52 nucleus.
Common sections in SUBENTs 6 and 7 deleted.
SD: Updated to new date formats,lower case.
Corrected according last EXFOR rules and Dict.
VV: STATUS, REACTION code in SUBENTs
